property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.29.7-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Oracle\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Calibre2\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\Zero Install;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\AutomationBox\MouseRobot2\Application;C:\ProgramData\AutomationBox\MouseRobot2\Application\tools;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\Fil\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Fil\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;;.

testcase.name: addingAddsDataToDatabase

failure.message:
The todos added in the user interface should end up in the database. The input was 2 3b5b e54c x
Now the database was empty.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: The todos added in the user interface should end up in the database. The input was 2 3b5b e54c x
Now the database was empty. at application.DatabaseTest.addingAddsDataToDatabase(DatabaseTest.java:162)

testcase.name: removeMultiple

failure.message: When a todo is removed in the user interface, it should not be found in the database anymore.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: When a todo is removed in the user interface, it should not be found in the database anymore. at application.DatabaseTest.removeMultiple(DatabaseTest.java:275)

testcase.name: markAsDoneMultiple

failure.message: When a todo is marked as done in the user interface, it should also become done in the database.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: When a todo is marked as done in the user interface, it should also become done in the database. at application.DatabaseTest.markAsDoneMultiple(DatabaseTest.java:223)

testcase.name: markAsDone

failure.message:
The changes made with the user interface should be reflected in the database. When the database contains the todo: Todo{id=1, name=exam, description=rehearse for the exam, done=false} And the input is: 3 1 x
The value of the done variable should be updated to true.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: The changes made with the user interface should be reflected in the database. When the database contains the todo: Todo{id=1, name=exam, description=rehearse for the exam, done=false} And the input is: 3 1 x
The value of the done variable should be updated to true. at application.DatabaseTest.markAsDone(DatabaseTest.java:194)

testcase.name: removeOne

failure.message:
Removing a todo in the user interface should also remove said todo from the database. When the database contains the todo: Todo{id=1, name=exam, description=rehearse for the exam, done=false} And the input is: 4 1 x
There should be zero rows in the database after executing the program.

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: Removing a todo in the user interface should also remove said todo from the database. When the database contains the todo: Todo{id=1, name=exam, description=rehearse for the exam, done=false} And the input is: 4 1 x
There should be zero rows in the database after executing the program. at application.DatabaseTest.removeOne(DatabaseTest.java:251)
